name: Buy Now Pay Later interest / late fees
summary: Deferred-payment plans from Affirm, Klarna, Afterpay, PayPal Pay-in-4 — hidden costs beyond the advertised 0% APR.

evidence.claim: CFPB 2023 findings: 'Pay-in-4' BNPL products advertised as '0% APR' frequently charge late fees, account fees, and high-interest deferred-payment products within the same app that are not clearly differentiated.

body.description: Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) plans advertise 0% APR on 4-installment plans, but longer-term plans on the same app charge 10-30%+ APR, and missed payments trigger late fees ($7-$25) that are not prominently disclosed (E1).

disclosureLegality.requirement: CFPB 2024 interpretive rule treats BNPL providers as credit-card-like; Truth-in-Lending disclosures apply for some BNPL products (E1).

negotiability.script: I noticed a late fee on my Pay-in-4 installment. This is my first late payment; can you waive it?
